title: Smoky Crumbly German Tomato Kartoffelpuffer
description: A classic German potato pancake dish, Smoky Crumbly German Tomato Kartoffelpuffer features the smoky flavor of paprika, the crunch of crumbled bacon, and a hint of tangy tomato.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add crumbled bacon to the skillet and cook until crispy, about 4-5 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside.
In a large bowl, combine grated potatoes, onion, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
Add diced tomato to the bowl and mix until well combined.
Add egg replacer to the bowl and mix until a thick batter forms.
Using a spoon, drop the potato mixture by tablespoonfuls into the skillet with the bacon grease.
Press the spoon into the skillet to make a small indentation in the center of each patty.
Cook the patties for 4-5 minutes on each side, or until they are golden brown and crispy.
Serve the Smoky Crumbly German Tomato Kartoffelpuffer hot, garnished with additional paprika and chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Note: If using egg replacer, mix according to package instructions before adding to the potato mixture.
